headline: Heavenly Cakes & Baking Academy wins Best Cakes & Baking Education Provider

content.text: Heavenly Cakes & Baking Academy and the award record

Heavenly Cakes & Baking Academy is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Cakes & Baking Education Provider. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Heavenly Cakes & Baking Academy, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Press reports describe Heavenly Cakes Baking Academy as a baking academy offering cake, pastry, and bakery education, and identify Lakmini Weerasuriya as founder/chairperson. The GBE archive records the academy award. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.

The Best Cakes & Baking Education Provider recognition places Heavenly Cakes & Baking Academy in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025.
